mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM( SELECT META_ENG_NM AS metaEngNm ,META_KOR_NM AS metaKorNm ,DATA_TYPE_NM AS dataTypeNm ,META_LEN AS metaLen ,DECIMAL_LEN AS decimalLen ,META_ENC_YN AS metaEncYn ,META_TERM_TYPE AS metaTermType ,@rownum := @rownum + 1 AS rn FROM TBMETABS WHERE 1=1
AND META_ENG_NM like CONCAT('%',#{metaEngNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND META_KOR_NM like CONCAT('%',#{metaKorNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND DATA_TYPE_NM like CONCAT('%',#{dataTypeNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND META_LEN like CONCAT('%',#{metaLen, jdbcType = NUMERIC},'%')
AND DECIMAL_LEN like CONCAT('%',#{decimalLen, jdbcType = NUMERIC},'%')
order by META_ENG_NM ) p , (SELECT @rownum := 0) r WHERE p.rn > ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC}-1) * #{pageSize , jdbcType=NUMERIC}) AND p.rn <= ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC} * #{pageSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC}))

SELECT count(*) cnt FROM TBMETABS WHERE 1=1
AND META_ENG_NM like CONCAT('%',#{metaEngNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND META_KOR_NM like CONCAT('%',#{metaKorNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND DATA_TYPE_NM like CONCAT('%',#{dataTypeNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND META_LEN like CONCAT('%',#{metaLen, jdbcType = NUMERIC},'%')
AND DECIMAL_LEN like CONCAT('%',#{decimalLen, jdbcType = NUMERIC},'%')

SELECT META_ENG_NM AS metaEngNm ,META_KOR_NM AS metaKorNm ,DATA_TYPE_NM AS dataTypeNm ,META_LEN AS metaLen ,DECIMAL_LEN AS decimalLen ,META_ENC_YN AS metaEncYn ,META_TERM_TYPE AS metaTermType FROM TBMETABS WHERE META_KOR_NM = #{metaKorNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.update: DELETE FROM TBMETABS WHERE META_ENG_NM = #{metaEngNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT EAI_IF_DATA_SEQ_NBR as ifDataSeq, EAI_IF_DATA_CRT_TMSTMP as ifDataCrtTmstmp, EAI_IF_DATA_APLY_TP_CD as ifDataAplyTpCd, EAI_IF_DATA_APLY_STS_CD as ifDataAplyStsCd, EAI_IF_DATA_APLY_TMSTMP as ifDataAplyTmstmp, EAI_IF_DATA_APLY_ERR_CD as ifDataAplyErrCd, EAI_IF_DATA_APLY_ERR_CONT as ifDataAplyErrMsg, STD_TRM_TP_CD as stdTrmTpCd, STD_TRM_LGCL_NM as stdTrmLgclNm, STD_TRM_PSCL_NM as stdTrmPsclNm, STD_TRM_DATA_TP_NM as stdTrmDataTpNm, STD_TRM_DATA_LEN as stdTrmDataLen, STD_TRM_DATA_SCL as stdTrmDataScl, STD_TRM_DMN_ENC_YN as stdTrmDmnEncYn FROM TB_EAI_STD_TRM_I WHERE EAI_IF_DATA_APLY_STS_CD = 'N' OR EAI_IF_DATA_APLY_STS_CD = 'E'
